allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking strengthens cognitive-biases by turning bias awareness into active questioning of assumptions, evidence, and self-deception.
allies.source_quote: Critical thinking requires self-reflection and questioning one's own assumptions, biases, and beliefs.

allies.rationale_text: Scientific-method-evidence-testing gives cognitive-biases a falsification path so judgments are checked against evidence instead of defended as intuitions.
allies.source_quote: This often involves consulting base rates rather than trusting anecdotal evidence or vivid, singular experiences.

antagonists.rationale_text: Authority-bias compounds cognitive-biases by making fluent confident claims feel credible before they are tested.
antagonists.source_quote: Biases result precisely from System 1 taking over.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Cognitive-biases conflicts with confidence-calibration when awareness of biases produces overcorrection that degrades well-calibrated intuitive judgments.
structured_tensions.source_quote: cognitive-biases conflicts with confidence-calibration (confidence calibration) when awareness of biases produces overcorrection that degrades well-calibrated intuitive judgments.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Cognitive-biases conflicts with bias-blind-spot when cataloguing biases in others creates the illusion of personal immunity to the same distortions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: cognitive-biases conflicts with bias-blind-spot (bias blind spot) when cataloguing biases in others creates the illusion of personal immunity to the same distortions.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
